name: Josef Crits
settings.defaultRuleset.name: Default Josef Crits Ruleset
settings.defaultRuleset.hint: Select which ruleset (Core or Up In Arms) is used by default.
settings.userOverrideRuleset.name: Josef Crits Ruleset Override
settings.userOverrideRuleset.hint: Override the default ruleset for this user only.
settings.integrationMode.name: Josef Crits Integration Mode
settings.integrationMode.hint: Choose how the Josef crit tables integrate with the WFRP4e system.
settings.debugMode.name: Josef Crits Debug Mode
settings.debugMode.hint: Enable debug logging for Josef crit rolls.
settings.defaultDamageType.name: Default Damage Type
settings.defaultDamageType.hint: Used when a vanilla critical lacks a damage type; determines which Josef table to roll.
settings.dryRunMode.name: Josef Crits Dry Run
settings.dryRunMode.hint: When enabled, the module will not actually apply injuries or conditions; instead it will post what would happen.
